---
name: RFC Proposal
about: Propose a new feature or extension to the AQML specification
title: "RFC: "
labels: rfc, enhancement
assignees: yupoet
---

## Summary

One-paragraph description of the proposed change.

## Motivation

Why is this needed? What use cases does it enable?

## Proposed Syntax

```yaml
# Show the proposed AQML syntax
```

## Backward Compatibility

Does this break existing valid `.aqml` files? How should older engines handle this?

## Alternatives Considered

What other approaches were considered and why were they rejected?

## References

Links to related projects, papers, or discussions.
